title: Modpack for ModernBeta's Community Server.
body:
Community voted modpack for ModernBeta's server, has all of the mods (plus optimization mods) that were voted by the community. It features what you would expect for a modpack that exists for server that takes us back to the old minecraft days - nostalgia. I also linked below a texture pack and shaderpack that further enhances your experience, though It is not needed and optional.

However there were some problems during the development, which lead me into (for now) only giving you link to the Nostalgia shaderpack, you have to manually download it since otherwise I need permission from the author and Its certain he won't give me it.

## Downloads:
Nostalgia Shader - https://modrinth.com/shader/nostalgia-shader

Texture Pack - Coming Soon!
## Credits:
